page.title: Category:Architecture of Wards in Hiroshima City

revision.comment: カテゴリ新規作成

[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:広島市の区の建築物]] [[ko:Category:히로시마시의 구별 건축물]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:広島市南区の建築物]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q125270279}} [[Category:Architecture by Ward in Designated Cities]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Hiroshima]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wards of Hiroshima]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q125270279)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
